item.title: depa panjie purnama
item.description: 🏢 working experience 📌 Evermos (PT. Setiap Hari Dipakai) Bandung 05-2020 to present Quality Engineer 📌 HOOQ (HOOQ Digital Pte. Ltd.) Bandung 01-2019 to 05-2020 Quality Engineer 📌 Cartenz (PT. Cartenz Technology Indonesia) Jakarta 12-2017 to 12-2018 Quality Assurance 📌 Divusi (PT. LAPI Divusi) Bandung 01-2017 to 12-2017 Software Tester 🏫 education 📌 Telkom University Bandung 2012 to 2016 Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Engineering 🎯 skills Technical: Manual Software Testing Automation Software Testing

item.title: Hello, World!!
item.description: writeln('Hello, World!!'); echo "Hello, World!!"; console.log("Hello, World!!")
